name: signoz
description: Official SigNoz plugin for docs guidance and ClickHouse dashboard queries

interface.shortDescription: Official SigNoz skills for docs guidance and ClickHouse queries
interface.longDescription: Installs the official SigNoz skills for using SigNoz docs and writing ClickHouse queries for traces and logs in Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use SigNoz to help me find the right docs page for OpenTelemetry instrumentation.
Use SigNoz to write a ClickHouse query for a SigNoz dashboard panel over traces or logs.
